series_metadata.series_description: Applications for Installers, Inspectors, Third Party Agencies, Building Departments, Health Departments, Dealers, Brokers, Salespeople and Sponsors of Intial Training or Continuing Education Courses,Applications, renewal applications, fingerprint results, surety bonds, education certificates. These records may contain social security numbers, check/credit card numbers or current residence addresses which are not a matter or public record for purposes of sections 149.03 of the Ohio Revised Code.
